data.description: You can attempt to open a door without the appropriate tool by using your Strength (Athletics) check. If you succeed, the door opens normally.
A character can concentrate on a spell to maintain the effects of a spell cast through a magic item or to maintain an effect such as greater invisibility.

You create a large, shimmering, translucent hand of force in unoccupied space that you can see within range. The hand lasts for the duration and moves at your command. The hand is an object with AC 20 and a maximum point-blank range of 5 feet. If it drops to 0 hit points, the spell ends. It has Strength 26 and Dexterity 10 (+0). The hand can't fill its space.

When you cast the spell and as a bonus action on each subsequent turn, you can move the hand up to 60 feet and cause it to strike one creature or object in that space. The hand deals bludgeoning damage equal to 2d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. You can then command the hand to point at a creature within range as a bonus action on each of your turns. If you do, you gain advantage on attack rolls against that target until the start of your next turn.
Create a wall of force that lasts until the end of your next turn.

1 action
